phases.label:
Inquiring &
Analysing
phases.description: Students identify a problem, analyse the need, conduct research, and develop a design brief.

nodes.label: Explain and justify
nodes.description: Students identify and articulate a genuine need for a specified client or target audience.

progression.y1: States or outlines a basic need; justification is simple or implicit.
progression.y3: Explains the need with emerging justification and some reference to context or research.
progression.y5: Explains and justifies the need in detail for a specific client or audience with clear supporting evidence.

nodes.label: Identify and prioritize
nodes.description: Students determine and prioritize the research required to develop a solution.

progression.y1: States main research points, often with guidance.
progression.y3: Constructs a research plan identifying primary and secondary research with some independence.
progression.y5: Independently identifies and prioritises detailed primary and secondary research relevant to the problem.

nodes.label: Analyse
nodes.description: Students analyse existing products to inform their own design thinking.

progression.y1: Describes features of one existing product.
progression.y3: Describes or analyses a group of similar products.
progression.y5: Analyses a range of existing products in detail, drawing relevant conclusions.

nodes.label: Develop
nodes.description: Students synthesise research into a design brief outlining the problem, user and constraints.

progression.y1: Develops a simple brief stating key findings.
progression.y3: Develops a structured design brief outlining research findings.
progression.y5: Develops a detailed design brief clearly summarising analysis and informing design decisions.

y1.text: States the need; states findings of research.
Outlines the need; states some research points; outlines features of one product; outlines findings.
Explains the need; prioritises research points; outlines product features; outlines relevant findings.
Explains and justifies the need; prioritises research independently; describes product features; presents findings.

y3.text: States the need; states some findings.
Outlines need; identifies research; outlines product; basic brief.
Explains need; constructs research plan; describes product group; develops brief.
Explains and justifies need; independent research plan; analyses products; develops detailed brief.

y5.text: Outlines need; identifies research; analyses one product; outlines brief.
Explains need; prioritises research; analyses range; develops brief.
Explains and justifies need; detailed research plan; detailed analysis; detailed brief.

phases.label:
Developing
Ideas
phases.description: Students generate, develop and justify design ideas based on specifications.

nodes.label: Develop
nodes.description: Students define success criteria for the solution.

progression.y3: Develops structured success criteria based on research.
progression.y5: Develops detailed and justified success criteria based on analysis.

nodes.label: Develop
nodes.description: Students generate a range of feasible ideas.

progression.y3: Produces a range of feasible ideas.
progression.y5: Produces a wide range of well-developed and annotated ideas.

nodes.label: Present
nodes.description: Students select and justify a design solution.

progression.y1: Selects a design with limited justification.
progression.y3: Justifies selection with reference to criteria.
progression.y5: Fully and critically justifies selection with detailed reference to specification.

nodes.label: Develop
nodes.description: Students create detailed plans for construction.

progression.y3: Creates accurate plans with key details.
progression.y5: Creates detailed and precise plans suitable for independent construction.
